subject: direct cross-rule result consumption
contract: Admit012EvaluationResult is not an ADMIT_013 input

subject: Exact4 observations
contract: source exactly the shared Exact4 in canonical order

subject: integrity comparison authority
contract: source exactly the three authority fields

subject: candidate_record|batch_context|stage_authorization_context
contract: must provide neither observations nor authority
precedence_or_continuation: fail closed at future routing layer

subject: future standalone evaluator
contract: no normalization inference file network provider read or recomputation

subject: download_result_status=failure
forbidden_behavior: override by 2xx length SHA or verdict

subject: success plus HTTP 200..299
contract: continue to content and integrity checks

subject: observed_content_length_bytes=0
contract: always blocked even when expected length is zero and authorities appear to pass

subject: provided trusted authorities
contract: every provided authority must avoid failure or mismatch

subject: expected SHA match or explicit verified
contract: at least one strong authority is required

subject: expected_content_length_bytes
contract: when present require exact integer equality

subject: complete business outcome
contract: success AND HTTP 2xx AND nonzero AND no provided mismatch/failure AND strong authority
forbidden_behavior: any simpler condition treated as pass
